description_long: This is a compact, three-tier shelving unit with a dark wood finish and a sturdy black metal frame. The top shelf is bordered by raised wooden sides and back, forming a shallow tray-like compartment, while the two lower shelves are open and flat, providing ample storage space. The frame consists of four vertical metal supports connected by horizontal bars, giving the structure stability and a modern industrial look. Small wheels are attached to the bottom, allowing for easy mobility across urban environments such as sidewalks, garages, or offices. The wood grain is visible on all shelves, adding a touch of warmth and texture to the otherwise utilitarian design. There are no doors, handles, or glass panels, making the contents easily accessible from all sides.
description: A three-tier, dark wood and black metal shelving unit with a tray-style top shelf and open lower shelves, supported by a wheeled metal frame. The design is modern, sturdy, and mobile, suitable for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the three wooden shelves, with the top shelf bordered by raised sides and back, and the open lower shelves clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the shelves, the raised tray-like top, and the vertical metal supports.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back panel of the top shelf and the open structure of the lower shelves, with the metal frame visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the side profile of the shelves and the supporting frame.
